productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Pink & White Pooh Kidswear
description: Composition:100% cotton onion pink shirt with white skirt and light pink belt bowWashcare:Machine wash in cold water with a gentle cycle using mild detergent. Wash dark colours seperately. Do not bleach. Do not soak nor wring. Dry it inside out. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron on print and studs.Fitting:Comfort FitYour little princess will look as sweet as honey this summer in this cotton pink, short-sleeved top and white skirt with a light pink belt bow from disney. A perfect summer party wear, the top and skirt have smiling Pooh prints, making your little girl look adorable.
